Class FindTacletBuilder<T extends FindTaclet>

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder.TacletBuilder<T>
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder.FindTacletBuilder<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
AntecTacletBuilder, RewriteTacletBuilder, SuccTacletBuilder
public abstract class FindTacletBuilder<T extends FindTaclet> extends TacletBuilder<T>
Superclass of TacletBuilder objects that have a non-empty find clause. This should be all of them except NoFindTacletBuilder.

    applicationRestriction
    encodes restrictions on the state where a rewrite taclet is applicable If the value is equal to ApplicationRestriction.NONE no state restrictions are posed ApplicationRestriction.SAME_UPDATE_LEVEL then \assumes must match on a formula within the same state as \find rsp.

    protected void
    checkBoundInIfAndFind()
    checks that a SchemaVariable that is used to match pure variables (this means bound variables) occurs at most once in a quantifier of the assumes and finds and throws an exception otherwise

  • Field Details

    • find

      protected SyntaxElement find

    • applicationRestriction

      protected ApplicationRestriction applicationRestriction
      encodes restrictions on the state where a rewrite taclet is applicable If the value is equal to
      • ApplicationRestriction.NONE no state restrictions are posed
      • ApplicationRestriction.SAME_UPDATE_LEVEL then \assumes must match on a formula within the same state as \find rsp. \add. For efficiency no modalities are allowed above the \find position
      • ApplicationRestriction.IN_SEQUENT_STATE the \find part is only allowed to match on formulas which are evaluated in the same state as the sequent

  • Constructor Details

    • FindTacletBuilder

      public FindTacletBuilder()

  • Method Details

    • checkBoundInIfAndFind

      protected void checkBoundInIfAndFind()
      checks that a SchemaVariable that is used to match pure variables (this means bound variables) occurs at most once in a quantifier of the assumes and finds and throws an exception otherwise
